body:
## Summary
- Move persisted streak-freeze state normalization into the shared `streakWithFreeze` module.
- Reuse that normalizer from `progressStore` instead of keeping a storage-local copy.
- Preserve stockpile caps, lifetime caps, far-future date rejection, deduped rescued days, and initial-freeze fallback for missing/corrupt state.

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-progress-schema-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern "streakWithFreeze" tests/v1-1-retention-selectors.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern "progress hydration normalizes unsafe persisted numeric fields|progress mutations return the same shape as persisted JSON readback" tests/content-progress-schema-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
title: Share streak freeze state normalization
